PARAM.description: collection must not be null
PARAM.name: collection
PARAM.content: the collection whose contents are the target of the #retailAll operation

PARAM.description: retain must not be null
PARAM.name: retain
PARAM.content: the collection containing the elements to be retained in the returned collection

RETURN.description: a collection containing all the elements of collection that occur at least once in retain.
RETURN.assertion: assert containsAny(methodResult, collection) && methodResult.size() == intersection(collection, retain).size();
RETURN.content: a collection containing all the elements of collection that occur at least once in retain.

THROWS.name: NullPointerException
THROWS.content: if either parameter is null

PARAM.description: collection must not be null
PARAM.name: collection
PARAM.content: the collection whose contents are the target of the {@code retainAll} operation

PARAM.description: retain must not be null
PARAM.name: retain
PARAM.content: the collection containing the elements to be retained in the returned collection

PARAM.description: equator must not be null
PARAM.name: equator
PARAM.content: the Equator used for testing equality

RETURN.description: true if the returned collection contains all elements of 'collection' that occur at least once in 'retain' according to the 'equator'
RETURN.assertion: assert isEqualCollection(result, subtract(collection, removeAll(collection, retain, equator)), equator);
RETURN.content: Collection containing all the elements of collection that occur at least once in retain according to the equator

THROWS.description: if any of the parameters is null
THROWS.name: NullPointerException
THROWS.content: if any of the parameters is null

PARAM.description: collection must not be null
PARAM.name: collection
PARAM.content: the collection from which items are removed (in the returned collection)

PARAM.description: remove must not be null
PARAM.name: remove
PARAM.content: the items to be removed from the returned collection

RETURN.description: a collection containing all the elements of collection except any elements that also occur in remove.
RETURN.content: a collection containing all the elements of collection except any elements that also occur in remove.

THROWS.name: NullPointerException
THROWS.content: if either parameter is null

PARAM.description: collection must not be null
PARAM.name: collection
PARAM.content: the collection from which items are removed (in the returned collection)

PARAM.description: remove must not be null
PARAM.name: remove
PARAM.content: the items to be removed from the returned collection

PARAM.description: equator must not be null
PARAM.name: equator
PARAM.content: the Equator used for testing equality

RETURN.description: true if the returned collection contains all elements of 'collection' except those equal to any element in 'remove' according to the 'equator'
RETURN.content: true if the returned collection contains all elements of 'collection' except those equal to any element in 'remove' according to the 'equator'
